info.title: Power Vital API
info.description:
Power Vital e-commerce + MLM platform backend.

## Languages
All user-facing strings live in three locales: **TR** (primary), **RU**, **KG**.
The active locale is negotiated via the `Accept-Language` header and a `lang`
query param. AI-generated translations fill missing locale fields automatically.

## Auth
Mutating endpoints require a `Bearer` JWT in the `Authorization` header.
Admin-only routes additionally check the `role` claim.

## Rate limiting
All `/api/*` routes are rate-limited to 150 req/min per IP. Burst over
the limit returns 429 with `Retry-After`.

## Errors
All errors return `{ error: string, issues?: ValidationIssue[] }` where
`ValidationIssue` has the shape `{ path, message, code }`.

RegisterRequest.description: Self-service customer registration. Sponsor chain is read from the sponsorId when present.

LoginRequest.description: Exchange email + password for a 24h JWT. Returns the token plus a public-safe user profile.

ChangePasswordRequest.description: Authenticated user changes their own password. Requires the current password as proof.

ProfileUpdateRequest.description: Authenticated user updates their own profile details (name, phone, address, city, birth date). Email/role/wallet are never editable here.

ProductCreateRequest.description: Create a new product with a fixed KGS price.

OrderStatusUpdateRequest.description: Manually move an order between workflow states. The system runs side effects (ascension, refunds) automatically on paid/completed.

CheckoutRequest.description: Create a pending order, atomically decrement stock, and return the QR payload for bank transfer. Use targetUserId (admin/cashier only) for POS sales on behalf of a customer.

hasMore.description: True if there is at least one more page
True if there is at least one more page

nextCursor.description: Opaque base64url cursor — null when there are no more pages

post.description: Register a new customer account

Exchange credentials for a short-lived access token (15m) + long-lived refresh token (7d). The refresh token is also set as an HttpOnly cookie. Replay of an already-rotated refresh token revokes the entire family.

200.description: Login successful. Returns accessToken + refreshToken + user profile + TTLs.

429.description: Too many login attempts (5/15min per IP)

post.description: Rotate the refresh token. The new refresh token is returned and (for browser clients) set as an HttpOnly cookie. The old token is marked revoked. If the supplied token has already been used, the entire family is revoked and 401 is returned. The refresh token may be sent either in the request body (refreshToken field) or via the HttpOnly pv_refresh cookie.

401.description: Invalid, expired, or replayed refresh token

post.description: Revoke the supplied refresh token (and its whole family). The HttpOnly cookie is cleared. Access tokens issued before this call remain valid until they expire (15 min max).

get.description: Return the authenticated user profile

put.description: Update the authenticated user's own profile (name, phone, address, city, birth date)

get.description: Return the distributor downline tree (max depth 8)
List products (public). When ?search= is provided, returns SearchResult envelope with relevance + snippet. Otherwise returns a plain product list.

post.description: Create a product (admin). Triggers auto-AI translation into RU/KG.

get.description: Dedicated full-text search (MySQL FULLTEXT with ngram parser). Always returns the SearchResult envelope with relevance scores and highlighted snippets.
Get a single product by id

put.description: Update a product (admin). Triggers re-translation if name changed.

delete.description: Delete a product (admin). Cascades orderItems + images.

get.description: List active categories (public)

post.description: Create a category (admin)

get.description: List active hero slides (public)

post.description: Create a hero slide (admin)

get.description: List ALL slides including inactive (admin)
Fetch the current site settings (public)
List pages (public)

post.description: Create a page (admin)

get.description: Get a page by slug
List orders (admin, paginated). Excludes cancelled by default; pass includeCancelled=true to include them. Filter by status.

put.description: Manually transition order status (admin). Triggers side effects on paid/completed.

post.description: Create a pending order, atomically decrement stock, return QR payload for bank transfer

201.description: Order created, returns orderId + totalKgs + bankInfo + qrPayload

post.description: Upload a bank transfer receipt (image or PDF, 5MB max)
Run OCR on the receipt. Strict mode: amount mismatch leaves order PENDING for manual review (NEVER auto-approves).

get.description: Fetch an order by id
Search users for POS sales (admin/cashier)
Fetch the authenticated user's wallet balances

post.description: Pay for an order using wallet balance (POS or e-commerce)
Create a withdrawal request (atomic: balance decremented immediately)

get.description: List the authenticated user's own withdrawal requests (paginated, newest first)
List the authenticated user's transactions (paginated).
Is MLM enabled? (public, Redis-cached)
Fetch system config + revenue/bonus/payout stats (admin)

post.description: Close the current week and roll points over (admin)

get.description: Full admin dashboard (revenue, low stock, recent orders)

Server-Sent Events (SSE) stream of admin-only events. Returns text/event-stream with one frame per event (`event: <type>` + `data: <json>`). Events: new_order, payment_received, ocr_pending, withdrawal_request, withdrawal_approved, withdrawal_rejected, review_pending, low_stock. Auth via Bearer header OR HttpOnly refresh-token cookie (same as other admin routes). Heartbeat every 25s.

schema.description:
SSE frames — `event: <type>
data: <json>

` per event, with `:` comment lines for heartbeats

get.description: List users (admin, paginated). Filterable by ?search=.

put.description: Update a user (role, monthly active, wallet balances)

get.description: List withdrawals (admin, paginated).
Get a single withdrawal request (admin)

put.description: Approve or reject a withdrawal. On reject, wallet is refunded atomically.

get.description: Live in-process metrics: HTTP request counts, latency histograms, SSE connections, refresh-token metrics, notification + search counts. Resets on process restart.

post.description: Reset all in-process metric counters (admin only, logged in audit).

get.description: List all reviews for moderation (admin)
List store reviews (admin, paginated)

Tail the most recent lines of the backend log file. Filters: ?level=info|warn|error|debug, ?q=text, ?limit=200, ?maxBytes=256K, ?since=ms. Returns parsed JSON lines ordered chronologically (oldest first).

post.description: Send a broadcast via Web Push (admin). Supports single / multi / segment targets. Mirrors /push/broadcast but admin-scoped.
One-off AI translation (admin). Each call costs API quota.

get.description: Translation coverage stats per model (admin)

post.description: Translate missing fields for one record (admin)
Translate missing fields for up to N records (admin)

get.description: Load the storefront UI string overrides (per locale) used to override the bundled locale JSON at storefront boot. Returns `{ overrides: { tr:{}, ru:{}, kg:{} } }`.

patch.description: Save a single UI string override. `key` is a dot path (e.g. `cart.addToCart`); an empty `value` removes the override (reverts to bundled default).

get.description: Revenue + units sold grouped by product category over the last N days. Each entry includes sharePct (out of 100). Cancelled orders are excluded.
Top N customers ranked by total spend (KGS). Default limit 10, max 50.
Top N products ranked by units sold (with revenue as secondary metric).
CSV export of orders (with date filter via ?from=&to=). Columns are RFC 4180 escaped, UTF-8 BOM prefix for Excel auto-detection, max 10k rows.
CSV export of users. Columns are RFC 4180 escaped, UTF-8 BOM prefix for Excel auto-detection, max 10k rows.
CSV export of products (filterable by categoryId and lowStock=1). Columns are RFC 4180 escaped, UTF-8 BOM prefix for Excel auto-detection, max 10k rows.
CSV export of withdrawal requests. Columns are RFC 4180 escaped, UTF-8 BOM prefix for Excel auto-detection, max 10k rows.

post.description: Bulk-update the status of up to 500 orders. Triggers side effects (audit event, payment_received SSE, etc.).
Bulk-update the role of up to 500 users.
Bulk-move up to 500 products into a category (null to un-categorize).
Bulk soft-delete (users) or hard-delete (orders/products). Always audited via adminEvents.

get.description: Live cart-recovery funnel: views → abandoned → recovered (admin)
Get the current user's cart

post.description: Add an item to the cart

get.description: Cursor-paginated audit log of the calling admin's impersonation sessions (most recent first). Sessions are tied to the real admin via X-Real-Admin header requirement.

schema.description: Opaque base64url cursor from a previous response

parameters.description: Opaque base64url cursor from a previous response
parameters.name: cursor

get.description: Get the current impersonation status for the calling admin. Used by the ImpersonationBanner / useImpersonation composable on mount.

post.description: Start an impersonation session against a target user. Returns 201 with the sessionId; subsequent requests must include X-Impersonation-Session=<id>.

delete.description: End an impersonation session early (admin-only — admins always have the kill switch).

get.description: List stock movements for a product

post.description: Heartbeat from a product page (10s cadence). Increments the live viewer count for the cart-recovery funnel.

get.description: Get the current live viewer count for a product (public, Redis-cached).
Get live viewers + abandoned carts (admin)

post.description: Subscribe the current browser to push notifications

get.description: Get the user's push preferences (admin/cashier)
Cursor-paginated broadcast log with actor/target/event filters.

schema.description: Opaque base64url cursor from a previous response

parameters.description: Opaque base64url cursor from a previous response
parameters.name: cursor

get.description: CSV export of broadcast history (admin). RFC 4180, UTF-8 BOM.

post.description: Send a push notification to a single user / multi-target list / role segment. Returns 201 with sent/expired/failed counters (and parentBroadcastId for multi).
Send a test push to the calling admin (browser self-test)
Submit a product review (public, pending until moderation)

get.description: List published reviews for a product (public)

post.description: Submit a store review (public)

get.description: List published store reviews (public)
Search users by name or email (LIKE, case-insensitive). Min 2 chars. Cached 60s. Used by AdminUserSearch typeahead.
Search products by name or barcode prefix. Cached 60s. Used by AdminProductSearch typeahead (AdminDashboard stock column).
Daily-bucketed aggregates over the last N days (default 30, max 365). Used by the AdminChartWidget on the dashboard.
List all media files (public)

post.description: Upload one or more images (admin). Produces WebP 85 + AVIF + 600/1024/1920 variants.

get.description: List media folders

post.description: Create a media folder (admin)

delete.description: Delete a folder (admin). Media inside are moved to root.

post.description: Upload high-res images (admin). Cap 2560w, quality 88.

put.description: Move a media file to a different folder (admin)

get.description: Liveness: process is up, returns uptime + memory
Readiness: pings the DB. Returns 503 if degraded.

post.description: Report a client-side error. Open to anonymous, rate-limited.

get.description: Admin: recent client errors. Pass ?resolved=true to include resolved.

post.description: Admin: mark a client error as resolved.
